subject: docs(mistakes): log missed Mapbox token restriction during security audit
body:
Security audit was marked complete but never flagged the public Mapbox
token lacking URL restrictions — a standard Mapbox hardening step that
should have been caught during any session reading the map code.

Tags: documentation, security, process
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: security-hardening
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_012GoRRuSkXvRWbQhj6XTrxn
title: log missed Mapbox token restriction during security audit
